seoTitle: Callington vs Caloote — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Callington and Caloote. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Callington and Caloote.
heading: Callington vs Caloote — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Callington, South Australia and Caloote, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Caloote has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Callington (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Callington or Caloote safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Callington has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Caloote scores 35/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Callington scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Caloote scores 21/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Callington or Caloote?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Caloote has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.88% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
